Abs.doc: Function Abs returns the absolute value of the specified value.

Absolute.doc: Sets the point designation method for VectorScript procedure calls. When this mode is active, all points specified in procedure calls are assumed to be coordinate locations within the document.

AcquireExportPDFSettingsAndLocation.doc: Asks the user for the Export PDF settings and the PDF file name (or folder name if the parameter is true).  This is intended to support Batch PDF Export.

ActiveClass.doc: Returns the name of the active class of the document.

ActLayer.doc: Function ActLayer returns a handle to the currently active layer in a document.

ActSSheet.doc: Function ActSSheet returns the handle to the currently active worksheet.

ActSymDef.doc: Function ActSymDef returns a handle to the currently active symbol.

ActSymDefN.doc: Function ActSymDefN returns a handle to the currently active symbol.

Add2DVertex.doc: This procedure will add to a polyline a vertex defined by its position, its type(0 to 4) and the radius if type is 3 or 4. A vertex of type 4 should be followed and preceded by corner vertices. If the

Add3DPt.doc: Procedure Add3DPt adds a vertex into a newly created 3D polygon.

AddButtonMode.doc: Adds an image button to the mode bar for a tool. Replaces vstAddButtonMode.

AddCavity.doc: Procedure AddCavity creates a wall cavity in a new wall object. The newly defined cavity becomes the default for all subsequently defined walls.

AddChoice.doc: Adds an item to the component's choices.

AddCustomTexPart.doc: This procedure adds a custom texture part with the specified ID and name to the object.  Use partID starting at 100 to avoid conflicts with existing texture parts.

AddHole.doc: AddHole uses a holeTemplate to create a hole inside objectToGetHole.  Upon success, objectToGetHole is converted to polyline.   holeTemplate is unchanged.

AdditionalDefRecords.doc: Shows the Additional Default Records dialog.

AddLBImage.doc: Adds specified image resource to image list.

AddLBOriginalName.doc: This function is called when hierarchical display is on and a new item is added to the list browser.

AddLevelFromTemplate.doc: Adds a new Story Layer to the Story pointed to by 'storyHandle', using the Story Level Template at 'index' as a template.  The story must not already contain a Story Level with the same level type or

AddListBoxTabStop.doc: Adds a tab stop to a Layout Manager list box.  The last parameter is the tab stop, in characters.  This function should be called in the dialog handler, as opposed to the dialog definition procedure.

AddListBrowserImage.doc: Adds an image to a list browser. Replaces AddLBImage.

AddObjectTo2DComp.doc: Adds an object to the specified 2D component group of a symbol definition or plug-in object. Use Top/Plan if you want to add the the object into the main container of the symbol definition or plug-in

AddPoint.doc: Procedure AddPoint adds a vertex point to a newly created polygon. AddPoint is designed to be used with BeginPoly and EndPoly to define new polygon objects via VectorScript.

AddRadioMode.doc: Adds a group of buttons with an image to the mode bar for a tool. Replaces vstAddRadioMode

AddResourceToList.doc: Adds the indicated resource to the specified resource list, if it is of the same type as the items already in the list.  Returns the index of the resource in the list or 0.

AddSolid.doc: Function AddSolid creates a new solid addition object from the referenced source objects. If the operation succeeds, the source objects will then be contained within the newSolid object, as the primit

AddStoryLevel.doc: Adds a new Story Layer to the Story pointed to by 'storyHandle'.  There must not be another story level in this story that matches 'levelType' or 'elevation', or the function will fail.  If the layer

AddStoryLevelN.doc: Adds a new Story Layer to the Story pointed to by 'storyHandle'.  There must not be another story level in this story that matches 'levelType' or 'elevation', or the function will fail.  If the layer

AddSubMtrlToMtrl.doc: Adds a Simple material to a Compound material. Sets the fraction of the Simple material as a relation to the whole. Fraction can have value between 0.0 and 1.0. "Primary" material is a simple material

AddSurface.doc: Creates a new surface object by combining the two referenced surface objects. If the combination is successful (if the objects overlap), it deletes the original surface objects and returns the handle

AddSymToWall.doc: Procedure AddSymToWall inserts a specified symbol into the referenced wall.

AddSymToWallEdge.doc: Procedure AddSymToWallEdge inserts a symbol in the referenced wall using the specified parameters to define placement.

AddTileGeometryObject.doc: Adds the specified object to the specified tile resource.

AddToPIOStyleEdit.doc: Adds an item to a plug-in style's default edit list. This is only used by objects that use the default edit style dialog.

AddToPluginStyle.doc: Adds a new item to a plug-in style map.

AddVectorFillLayer.doc: Procedure AddVectorFillLayer is used to add layers to a vector fill definition. This procedure call should follow a call to BeginVectorFillN.

AddVertex3D.doc: Procedure AddVertex3D adds a 3D vertex to the referenced 3D polygon object.

AddVPAnnotationObject.doc: Adds the specified annotation object to the specified viewport.

AddWallBottomPeak.doc: Adds a peak to the bottom of the referenced wall.

AddWallPeak.doc: Procedure AddWallPeak creates a wall peak in the referenced wall object.

AddWSColumnOperator.doc: Adds database column operator to specified column.

AdjustComponentPixelPos.doc: Adjust the pixel width and height of the specified Layout Manager component.

AlertCritical.doc: Informs the user of a serious problem that requires intervention or correction before work can continue.

AlertCriticalHLink.doc: Informs the user of a serious problem that requires intervention or correction before work can continue. Provides a hyperlink (HLink) to further help the user resolve the problem.

AlertInform.doc: Displays an alert dialog which provides the user with information about the result of a command. It offers no user choices.

AlertInformDontShowAgain.doc: Displays an alert dialog which provides the user with information about the result of a command with an option to not show the dialog again. It offers no user choices.

AlertInformHLink.doc: Displays an alert dialog which provides the user with information about the result of a command. It offers no user choices. It provides a hyperlink (HLink) to further help the user.

AlertInformHLinkN.doc: Displays an alert dialog which provides the user with information about the result of a command with an option to not show the dialog again. It offers no user choices. It provides a hyperlink (HLink)

AlertQuestion.doc: Displays an alert dialog which alerts the user to a condition or situation that requires the user's decision and input before preceding; such as an impending action with potentially destructive or irr

AlertQuestionDontShowAgain.doc: Displays an alert dialog which alerts the user to a condition or situation that requires the user's decision and input before preceding; such as an impending action with potentially destructive or irr

AlertSetAlwaysDoVal.doc: Set the 'always do' value for the AlertQuestionDontShowAgain and AlertInformDontShowAgain standard dialogs.

AlignItemEdge.doc: Aligns the specified control item with other items having the same edge and alignment id values. To align several control items, call this function once for each item to be aligned using a common alig

AlrtDialog.doc: Procedure AlrtDialog displays an alert dialog to the user.

Ang2Vec.doc: Returns a 3-dimensional vector that is defined by the specified polar angle and length values.

AngBVec.doc: Returns the positive angle between the two specified vectors, in the range of 0 180 degrees.

AngDialog.doc: Function AngDialog displays a dialog box which requests the user to enter an angle value. The dialog automatically screens for valid numeric input, and will accept supported angle formats.

AngDialog3D.doc: Function AngDialog3D displays a dialog box which requests the user to enter three angle values. AngDialog3D will accept angle values in any supported angle format.

Angle.doc: Returns the angle value of a line segment or an arc. If more than one line segment or arc matches the search criteria, the function will return the sum of the matching objects' angle values.

Angle2Str.doc: Convert an angle value from a real number to a string using the current document formatting.

AngleVar.doc: Sets the angle designation method in VectorScript. When called, VectorScript will treat language symbols which can be interpreted as direction angles (e.g., N, S, NW, SE) as variables rather than angl

AngularDim.doc: Procedure AngularDim creates an angular dimension in the document.

Append.doc: Procedure Append opens the specified file for writing and appends the data to the end of the file. Existing data in the file is NOT overwritten.

AppendRoofEdge.doc: Function AppendRoofEdge creates a new edge in the referenced roof object.

ApplyCustomTexPart.doc: Applies the src object's custom texture part partID to dest Overall part.  For example apply PIO texture partID 100 to extrude's Overall part.  If the dest object does not support the src map type the

ApplyLightInfoRecord.doc: Apply Light Info Record from a symbol to an object.

Arc.doc: Procedure Arc creates an arc object, or a polyline object, in the active document. If p1 and p2 define a perfect square, an arc will be created, with its center point at the center of the square. If p

ArcByCenter.doc: Creates an arc using a center point, the radius, a start angle, and a sweep.

ArcCos.doc: Function ArcCos returns the arccosine (in radians) of the specified value.

ArcSin.doc: Function ArcSin returns the arc sine (in radians) of the specified value.

ArcTan.doc: Function ArcTan returns the arc tangent (in radians) of the specified value.

ArcTo.doc: Procedure ArcTo creates an arc vertex with a point of intersection at the specified coordinate point.

Area.doc: Returns the area of an object. If more than one object matches the search criteria, the function will return the sum of all the matching object areas.

Area2Str.doc: Convert an area value from a real number to a string using the current document formatting.

AreaN.doc: Returns the area of an object. If more than one object matches the search criteria, the function will return the sum of all the matching object areas.

AreLBColumnLinesEnabled.doc: Determines if column lines are drawn.

AreLBRadioColumnLinesEnabled.doc: Determines if "column" lines are drawn between radio control items.

AreWorksheetGridLinesVisible.doc: Returns true if the grid lines are enabled for the specified worksheet.

AssociateLayerWithStory.doc: Associates a Layer with a Story. When a Layer is associated with a Story, the Layer's elevation is displayed relative to the Story elevation. If the elevation of the associated Story is changed, the e

AssociateLinearDimension.doc: Associates a linear dimension with an object when the dimension's endpoints are coincident with objects in the drawing.  When selectedObjectsMode is true, only selected objects will be checked to see

AttachDefaultTextureSpace.doc: Procedure AttachDefaultTextureSpace deletes any pre-existing space attached to the referenced object and creates a new one with the default object texture.

AutoFitWSRowHeights.doc: Auto fit the height of rows to the content of the cells in the referenced worksheet.

AutoKey.doc: Function AutoKey returns TRUE if a non-modifier keyboard character has been continually depressed for longer than the system defined key repeat rate. If a keyboard character has been continually depre

Backward.doc: Procedure Backward moves the selected objects down one level in the onscreen object stacking order.

BeginColumn.doc: Procedure BeginColumn creates a column object in a Vectorworks document using 2D object creation procedure calls to define the "template" for the column object.

BeginContext.doc: Use this function in conjuction with EndContext to starts logging changes that are  made until the EndContext is reached.

BeginFloor.doc: Procedure BeginFloor creates a new floor object in a Vectorworks document. BeginFloor uses 2D object creation procedure calls to define the "template" for the object.

BeginFolder.doc: Procedure BeginFolder creates a new symbol folder in a Vectorworks document. Any symbols or symbol folders created after the current call to BeginFolder will be nested inside the new symbol folder. A

BeginFolderN.doc: Procedure BeginFolderN creates a new resource folder of the indicated type in a Vectorworks document. Any resource or folder of that type created after the current call to BeginFolderN will be nested

BeginGroupN.doc: May be used to create objects in an existing group by passing a group handle; if a handle initialized to nil is passed a new group is created.

BeginMesh.doc: Procedure BeginMesh begins the efinition of a 3D mesh object in Vectorworks. Any 3D point or planar object call after BeginMesh will be included in the mesh object.

BeginModeButtonsText.doc: Creates a mode bar buttons help text.

BeginMultDashConvert.doc: Used when a number of pseudo index to dash style conversion operations (or vice versa) are going to be performed.

BeginMultipleDuplicate.doc: Use this function in conjunction with EndMultipleDuplicate to preserve constraints on multiple duplicated objects.

BeginMXtrd.doc: Procedure BeginMXtrd creates a multiple extrude object in a Vectorworks document. BeginMXtrd uses 2D object creation procedure calls to define the "template" for the object.

BeginPoly.doc: Procedures BeginPoly creates a new polygon or polyline object in a Vectorworks document. When used with vertex creation procedure calls, BeginPoly and EndPoly() define the polygon object on a vertex b

BeginPoly3D.doc: Procedure BeginPoly3D creates a 3D polygon in the Vectorworks document. This procedure is used with Add3DPt and EndPoly3D to create 3D polygons. Any calls to the Add3DPt procedure after BeginPoly3D wi

BeginRoof.doc: Procedure BeginRoof creates a simple roof object in a Vectorworks document.

BeginSweep.doc: Procedure BeginSweep creates a three-dimensional sweep object in the Vectorworks document. A sweep object is a two-dimensional template object which has been rotated about a specified point to create

BeginSym.doc: Procedure BeginSym creates a new symbol definition ina Vectorworks document.

BeginText.doc: Procedures BeginText creates a new text object in a Vectorworks document. All text specified between calls to BeginText and EndText will be part of the new text object.

BeginVectorFillN.doc: Procedure BeginVectorFillN creates a new vector fill definition in a Vectorworks document. The value of vectorFillName will change only if the hatch name already exists.

BeginXtrd.doc: Procedure BeginXtrd creates a 3D extrude object in a Vectorworks document. BeginXtrd uses 2D object creation procedure calls to define the "template" for the object.

BindLayerToArcGISFS.doc: Associate the active design layer with the ArcGIS feature service and bring in georeferenced shapes and data. The parameter inRequestAll specifies the extent of the requested features. If inRequestAll

BindLayerToWFSFS.doc: Associate the active design layer with the WFS feature service and bring in georeferenced shapes and data. The parameter inRequestAll specifies the extent of the requested features. If inRequestAll =

BotBound.doc: Returns the y-coordinate of the bounding box (bottom right corner) of an object matching the search criteria. If more than one object matches the search criteria, the function will return the bottom v

BotBoundN.doc: Returns the y-coordinate of the bounding box (bottom right corner) of an object matching the search criteria. If more than one object matches the search criteria, the function will return the value of

BreakWall.doc: Procedure BreakWall creates a break in a wall object on the left or the right at a specified offset location.

BuildConstraintModelForObject.doc: Create a constraint model for the specified object in the constraint manager. If 'traverseContainers' is true and the specified object is a symbol definition, a group or another container-like objects

BuildResourceList.doc: Creates an implicit list of  resources of a specified type, and returns an ID for the list. Values in the list can be retrieved using GetNameFromResourceList.

BuildResourceList2.doc: Creates an implicit list of resources of a specified type, and returns an ID for the list. Values in the list can be retrieved using GetNameFromResourceList.

BuildResourceListN.doc: Build a resource list from the specified file.

BuildResourceListN2.doc: Build a resource list from the specified file.

CalcPolySegLen.doc: Calculate the length between two segments of a polygon or polyline

CalcSurfaceArea.doc: Function CalcSurfaceArea calculates the surface area of the referenced solid object. The function supports only valid solids objects.

CalcVolume.doc: Function CalcVolume calculates the volume of the referenced solid object. The function supports only valid solids objects.

CallTool.doc: Activates the specified Vectorworks tool for a single use. After the tool has been used Vectorworks will revert back to the previously active tool.

CallToolByIndex.doc: Similar to CallTool. Takes the internal ID of a tool.

CallToolByName.doc: Similar to CallTool, but takes name rather than ID. Supports plug-in tools (but not yet internal tools).

CallToolWithMode.doc: Activates the specified Vectorworks tool for a single use with the specified tool mode. After the tool has been used Vectorworks will revert back to the previously active tool.

CapsLock.doc: CapsLock returns TRUE if the Caps Lock was depressed during the last user event. This function operates with the MouseDown, KeyDown, AutoKey, GetPt, GetPtL, GetLine, and GetRect calls.

CC_CircuitFromShape.doc: Creates circuit from the given shape. The shape must be line, polygon or polyline. Returns the handle of the created circuit.

CC_DeviceFromShape.doc: Creates device from the given shape. The shape must be rectangle, rounded rectangle, polygon or polyline. Returns the handle of the created device.

CC_OnFindAndReplace.doc: Custom find and replace fuctionality for ConnectCAD objects.

CC_ReloadData.doc: Reloads ConnectCAD data from the application, work group and user folder. Device database, signal types, connector types, cable options, cable types, custom cable lengths, jack field panel data, term

CC_RoomFromShape.doc: Creates layout room from the given shape. The shape must be rectangle, rounded rectangle, polygon or polyline. Returns the handle of the created room.

CC_RouteFromShape.doc: Creates cable path from the given shape. The shape must be polygon, polyline or 3D polygon. Returns the handle of the created cable path.

CellHasNum.doc: Function CellHasNum returns TRUE if the specified cell of a referenced worksheet contains a value or an equation which returns a numeric value.

CellHasStr.doc: Function CellHasStr returns TRUE if the specified cell of a referenced worksheet contains a value or an equation which returns a numeric value.

CellString.doc: Function CellString returns the string of a specified cell in the active worksheet

CellValue.doc: Function CellValue returns the numeric value of a specified cell in the active worksheet. If the specified cell is not a numeric type, then this function returns 0.

Centroid.doc: Returns the centroid of the object. Returns false if an unsupported object type is supplied.

Centroid3D.doc: Returns the center of gravity of a 3D object. The function returns TRUE if the values were found.

CheckoutObj.doc: Checkouts all objects which match the search criteria.

Chr.doc: Function Chr returns the ASCII character corresponding to the specified numeric code. The ASCII code value must be between 1 and 255.

CircleCircleInters.doc: Finds the intersection of two circles.

CircularDim.doc: Procedure CircularDim creates a diameter or radial dimension in a Vectorworks document.

ClassList.doc: Returns the name of the specified class in the document class list. For example,  ClassList(4) will return the name of the fourth class in the list.

ClassNum.doc: Returns the total number of classes in the active document.

ClearCavities.doc: Procedure ClearCavities resets the default cavity style of wall objects to no cavities.

ClearGradientSliderSegments.doc: Removes all segments (except for 2) from the gradient slider.

ClearWallPeaks.doc: Removes all wall peaks from the referenced wall.

ClearWSCell.doc: Clears content and resets attributes of a cell in the referenced worksheet.

ClipPolygon.doc: Same as IntersectSurface, but improves performance by first checking to see if hClipper is within the bounding box of hPolygon before calling IntersectSurface.

ClipSurface.doc: Creates a new surface object by subtracting the intersection of surfaces s1 and s2 from s1.

ClipSurfaceN.doc: Creates a new surface object by subtracting the intersection of surfaces s1 and s2 from s1.

Close.doc: Procedure Close closes the specified text file.

ClosePDFDocument.doc: This will finish creating the PDF document that you started with OpenPDFDocument.  This is intended to support Batch Export to PDF.

ClosePoly.doc: Procedures ClosePoly set the polygon creation mode for polygon objects created in VectorScript to closed. To turn this mode off, use Procedure OpenPoly; the two modes used in conjunction will act as a

CloseSS.doc: Procedure CloseSS closes the referenced worksheet.

ClosestPoints.doc: Returns the points on two objects where the shortest distance between those objects occurs. Should support all VW primitives, including polylines and NURBS. Would be nice if it supported groups, symbo

Cloud.doc: Draws a cloud. Varies the billows of the clouds randomly between rMin and rMax. The hFactor is the height of each individual arc in the cloud.

ClrMessage.doc: Procedure ClrMessage closes the message palette.

CnvrtToGenericSolid.doc: Converts Solid objects to generic solids. Removes solid history saving memory.

CollapseAllLBItems.doc: This function is called when a list browser is in hierarchical display mode, and it removes all items that are not at the top level and closes all container items.

ColorIndexToRGB.doc: Procedure ColorIndexToRGB converts the Vectorworks palette colors from the colors' palette position index to its red, green, and blue component values. RGB values are in the range of 0 65535.

ColorIndexToRGBN.doc: Procedure ColorIndexToRGBN converts the Vectorworks palette colors from the colors' palette position index to its red, green, and blue component values. RGB values are in the range of 0 65535.Paramete

CombineIntoSurface.doc: Creates a polyline from the bounded selection surrounding the inIncludedPoint.

Command.doc: Command returns TRUE if the Command key (Mac) or Control key (Windows) was depressed during the last user event. This function operates with the MouseDown, KeyDown, AutoKey, GetPt, GetPtL, GetLine, an

Comp.doc: Returns the components of a comparison of two vectors.

ComponentArea.doc: Returns the area of one side the specified component, minus any holes in the 3D object.

ComponentVolume.doc: Returns the 3D volume of the specified component, minus any holes in the 3D object.

Concat.doc: Function Concat combines, or concatenates, all the specified parameters in order and returns the resultant string.

ConsolidatePlanar.doc: Modifies the plane of the second planar object so it is on the plane of the first object. Also moves the object so plane change doesn't affect it's position.

ContainsLight.doc: Function ContainsLight returns TRUE if the referenced object contains a light.  This function works with container objects such as groups, symbols, layers, etc.

ConvertTo3DPolys.doc: Converts an object to 3D polygons. This function successfully converts rectangles, circles, arcs, polylines, polygons, ovals, lines, straight walls, curved walls, and roofs.

ConvertToArcPolyline.doc: Convert, within a tolerance, the input polyline into an polyline that uses arcs for the curves

ConvertToNURBS.doc: This function converts the input object into a new NURBS object or a group of NURBS objects in the document.

ConvertToPolyline.doc: Converts any enclosed shape (circle, rectangle, ellipse, etc.) into a polygon or polyline. Does not polygonalize.

ConvertToUnstyledSlab.doc: Sets a slab to be unstyled.

ConvertToUnstyledWall.doc: Sets a wall to be unstyled.

ConvToUnstyledRoof.doc: Sets a roof to be unstyled.

Copy.doc: Function Copy returns a substring from a specified source string.

CopyMode.doc: Procedure CopyMode sets the transfer mode for the active design layer.  If a sheet layer is active, the procedure has no effect.

CopySymbol.doc: Procedure CopySymbol will copy a symbol into the active document from a user specified source document.

Cos.doc: Function Cos returns the cosine of the specified value. The base value is assumed to represent an angle in radians.

Count.doc: Counts all of the objects which match the search criteria.

CountFillSpaces.doc: Returns the number of fill spaces currently attached to a specified object.

Create2DObjShadow.doc: Create a shadow representation of the given 2D object at the specified offset vector.

CreateBatDormer.doc: Function CreateBatDormer creates a bat dormer in the referenced roof object.

CreateBorderlessBtn.doc: Creates a borderless button control in a dialog layout.

CreateBorderlessMenu.doc: Creates a borderless menu button control in a dialog layout.

CreateCenteredStaticText.doc: Similar to CreateStaticText, but creates static text that is centered in its control field on the dialog.

CreateChainDimension.doc: Creates and returns a single chain dimension object when the two dimensions or chains that are passed in meet the requirements for being in a single chain dimension object.

CreateCheckBox.doc: Creates a check box control in a dialog layout.

CreateCheckBox2.doc: Create a checkbox with an icon.

CreateCheckBoxGroupBox.doc: Creates a checkbox group box.  The checkbox will have name as its label.  If hasFrame is true, the group will have a box drawn around it like a regular group box.

CreateClassPullDownMenu.doc: Creates a Layout Manager class pull down menu control.

CreateColorPopup.doc: Create a color popup dialog control that displays the 256 color palette associated with the active document.

CreateCone.doc: Creates a 3D cone object in a Vectorworks document.

CreateContourCurves.doc: Creates contour curves for  a solid object given the delta, point on plane and plane normal.  If delta is 0, only 1 curve is created, where the specified plane intersects the selected solid.

CreateControl.doc: Creates a new extended dialog control item. Supported extended dialog controls include image, system color palette, and slider controls.

CreateCustomControl.doc: Creates a layout manager control in a VectorScript to be used in conjuction with GS_OverrideControl in an external dialog handler.

CreateCustomObjectN.doc: Creates a custom object instance at specified location and angle of rotation.  The calling function can also set whether the pref dialog should appear.

CreateCustomObjectPath.doc: Creates an instance of the path custom object specified by the name argument.  The vertices of the path are translated in such a way that the first vertex will be placed at the origin of the plug-in's

CreateCustThumbPopup.doc: Creates a custom thumbnail popup that can be populated with previews of objects in Vectorworks.

CreateDataVisPDMenu.doc: Creates a Layout Manager data visualization pull down menu control.

CreateDesignLayerPullDownMenu.doc: Creates a Layout Manager design layer pull down menu control.

CreateDuplicateObject.doc: Duplicates the specified object and inserts the new  object into the container.  If container is nil, the new object will be inserted in the active container.

CreateDuplicateObjN.doc: Duplicates the specified object and inserts the new  object into the container.  If container is nil, the new object will be inserted in the active container (Functionlaity of CreateDuplicateObject).

CreateEditColorText.doc: Create a text box allowing collor and collapsing of text.

CreateEditInteger.doc: Creates an editable text field control for INTEGER and LONGINT values.

CreateEditPassword.doc: Creates an password text field control in a dialog layout.

CreateEditReal.doc: Creates an editable text field control for REAL values.

CreateEditText.doc: Creates an editable text field control in a dialog layout.

CreateEditTextBox.doc: Creates a scrolling multiline editable text field in a dialog layout.

CreateEnhancedPullDownMenu.doc: Creates a Layout Manager enhanced pull down menu control.

CreateExtrudeAlongPath.doc: Creates a new path extrude object in the document.  The profile defines the shape of the cross-section, and is extruded along the path to generate the resulting object.

CreateFillSpace.doc: Creates a new fillspace object and attaches it to the end of the aux list of the specified object.

CreateFolder.doc: Creates a folder on the hard drive.

CreateGableDormer.doc: Function CreateGableDormer creates a gable dormer in the referenced roof object.

CreateGroupBox.doc: Creates a new group box control in a dialog layout.

CreateGroupOutline.doc: Returns a handle to the polygon which is the outline of a group.

CreateHemisphere.doc: Function CreateHemisphere creates a new hemisphere object in a Vectorworks document.

CreateHipDormer.doc: Function CreateHipDormer creates a hip dormer in the referenced roof object.

CreateHLHandle.doc: Create a new Hidden Line Rendering options handle.

CreateIconPushButton.doc: Creates an icon push button with the specified icon ID and width in characters.

CreateImageControl.doc: Creates a Layout Manager image control.

CreateImageFromPaint.doc: Creates an image resource from a paint node.

CreateImageProp.doc: Create an image prop from the options specified.

CreateImagePushButton.doc: Creates an image push button. Replaces CreateIconPushButton

CreateImgFromSymbolN.doc: Creates an image from the specified symbol in the specified rendering mode and view, and uses the specified component of the image.

CreateInterpolatedSurface.doc: Creates an interpolated surface with the specified degrees and number of points.  The resulting surface passes through each of the interpoliation points.  If a handle to a NURBS surface is provided, t

CreateLayer.doc: Creates a layer of the specified type.

CreateLayerLevelType.doc: Creates a Layer Level Type.  A Layer can be assigned a Layer Level Type, which defines its location within a Story.

CreateLayerPDMenu.doc: Creates a Layout Manager layer pull down menu control.

CreateLayout.doc: Creates a new custom dialog layout. After the layout is created, control items for the dialog can be added to the layout.

CreateLB.doc: Creates a layout manager list browser control.

CreateLevelTemplate.doc: Creates a Story Level Template in the current file. Sets the index parameter to the index of the new template in the list of templates. Story Levels contain a level type, elevation, and optional layer

CreateLevelTemplateN.doc: Creates a Story Level Template in the current file. Sets the index parameter to the index of the new template in the list of templates. Story Levels contain a level type, elevation, and optional layer

CreateLight.doc: CreateLight creates a new light object in the active VectorScript document.

CreateLineAttributePopup.doc: Create a dialog control that displays both line style and line weight choices available in the current document.

CreateLineStylePopup.doc: Create a dialog control that displays the line style choices available in the active document.

CreateLineWeightPopup.doc: Create a line weight popup dialog control to display list of line weights available in current document.

CreateListBox.doc: Creates a new list box control in a dialog layout.

CreateListBoxN.doc: Creates a new list box control in a dialog layout. With isMultipleSelect true, the list supports multiple selection.

CreateLoftSurfaces.doc: Creates NURBS surfaces by interpolating a group of cross-section curves.  The nurbs curves are lofted in the order in which they were added to the group.

CreateMarkerPopup.doc: Creates a popup control that displays the various marker styles available in Vectorworks and allows the user to choose one.  Markers are the adornments at the endpoints of line objects and consist of

CreateNurbsCurve.doc: Creates a new NURBS curve in the document.

CreateNurbsSurface.doc: Creates a new NURBS surface in the document. The surface has two directions, denoted u and v. The surface acts like a set of NURBS curves in each direction, with the number of control points and the d

CreateOffsetNurbsObjectHandle.doc: Returns a handle to a NURBS object that is offset from the given NURBS object h by the offset distance.

CreateOpenGLHandle.doc: Return a new OpenGL options handle.

CreatePaintFromImage.doc: Creates a paint node from an image resource.

CreatePaintFromImgN.doc: Creates a paint node from an image resource on the specified location and rotation.

CreatePatternPopup.doc: Create a pattern popup dialog control that displays all fill patterns available in current document.

CreatePullDownMenu.doc: Creates a new pulldown menu control in a dialog layout.

CreatePullDownMenuGroupBox.doc: Creates a Layout Manager pull down menu group box.

CreatePullDownSearch.doc: Creates a pulldown menu with a search bar at the top.

CreatePushButton.doc: Creates a new push button control in a dialog layout.

CreateRadioButton.doc: Creates a new radio button control in a dialog layout.

CreateRadioButton2.doc: Create a radio button with icon.

CreateRadioButtonGroupBox.doc: Creates a radio button group box.  The radio button will have name as its label.  If hasFrame is true, the group will have a box drawn around it like a regular group box.

CutProfileHoles.doc: Cut holes in object geometry described in it's profile group.

GetLBItemLineType.doc: Gets the specified list browser item's line type.

GetLBItemMkrByClass.doc: Gets if the specified list browser item's marker is by class.

GetLBItemMkrChoice.doc: Gets the specified list browser item's marker.

GetLBItemOrigName.doc: Returns the original name for a list browser item when hierarchical display is on. If the item is a container item, it will return an empty string.

GetLBItemPatternIndex.doc: Gets the specified list browser item's pattern index.

GetLBItemPenBackColor.doc: Gets the specified list browser item's pen background color.

GetLBItemPenForeColor.doc: Gets the specified list browser item's pen foreground color.

GetLBItemTextColor.doc: Gets the text color for the specified list browser item.

GetLBItemTextJust.doc: Gets the text alignment for the specified list browser item.

GetLBItemTextStyle.doc: Gets the text style for the specified list browser item.

GetLBItemTileRefNum.doc: Sets the specified list browser item's tile.

GetLBMultImageIndexes.doc: Gets the index of the images within the list browser multi image display.

GetLBOrigNameClLevel.doc: This function returns the close levels for an original name in the list browser. If the item for the name is displayed, then all the closeLevels will be false.

GetLBSortColumn.doc: Gets the index of the sort column in the specified list browser control.

GetLevelElevation.doc: Gets the elevation of a Story Level, relative to its containing Story.

GetLevelElevationN.doc: Gets the elevation of a Story Level, relative to its containing Story. The elevation is in document units.

GetLevelTemplateInfo.doc: Used to access the properties of the Story Level Template at 'index'.  The name, scaleFactor, levelType, elevation, and wallHeight parameters of the requested Story Level Template will be returned in

GetLevelTemplateName.doc: Returns the name of the nth Story Level Template in the file. For example, if 3 is passed in, it will return the name of the 3rd Story Level Template in the file.

GetLevelTmpltInfoN.doc: Used to access the properties of the Story Level Template at 'index'.  The name, scaleFactor, levelType, elevation, and wallHeight parameters of the requested Story Level Template will be returned in

GetLevelTypeName.doc: Returns the name of the nth Level Type in the file. For example, if 3 is passed in, it will return the name of the 3rd Level Type in the file.

GetLightColorRGB.doc: Procedure GetLightColorRGB returns the RGB color values for the referenced light object.

GetLightDirection.doc: Procedure GetLightDirection returns the direction angles of the referenced light object.

GetLightFalloff.doc: Procedure GetLightFalloff returns the fall off attributes for the referenced light object.

GetLightInfo.doc: Procedure GetLightInfo returns the attributes of the referenced light object.

GetLightLocation.doc: Procedure GetLightLocation returns the position of the referenced light object.

GetLine.doc: Procedure GetLine returns two user selected points, and draws a temporary "rubberband" line when prompting for the second point. This cannot be used if there is a function anywhere in the calling chai

GetLine3D.doc: Procedure GetLine3D returns two user selected points, and draws a temporary "rubberband" 3D line when prompting for the second point. This cannot be used if there is a function anywhere in the calling

GetLineAttributeData.doc: Deprecated - will generate error. Use GetLineTypeAttriData instead.

GetLineStyleChoice.doc: Deprecated - will generate error. Use GetLineTypeChoice instead.

GetLineTypeAtIndex.doc: Get the line type at the specified index in the line style control.

GetLineTypeAttriData.doc: Get the current choices for the combined line style and line weight dialog control.  The line type value is the line type internal index (reference number). The line weight value is in mils.

GetLineTypeChoice.doc: Get current choice of line style popup dialog control.  Choice is the internal index (reference number) of the line type.

GetLineWeightChoice.doc: Get current choice for a line weight dialog control.  The value is in mils.

GetLinkHeightToLayerDeltaZ.doc: Returns whether or not the wall's height is linked to the layer delta z.

GetLName.doc: Function GetLName returns the name of the referenced layer.

GetLoadParent.doc: Get the count of cells attached to a Lighting Device.

GetLocalizedPluginChoice.doc: Returns true with outChoice as specified by inPluginName, inParameterName and inChoiceIndex.  Each of the input names are universal names.

GetLocalizedPluginName.doc: Get the localized name of a plug-in given its universal name.

GetLocalizedPluginParameter.doc: Get the localized name of a plug-in parameter.

GetLocPt.doc: Procedure GetLocPt returns the coordinate location of the referenced locus.

GetLocus3D.doc: Procedure GetLocus3D returns the coordinates of the referenced 3D locus object.

GetLS.doc: Deprecated - will generate error. Use GetLSN instead.

GetLScale.doc: Function GetLScale returns the scale of the referenced layer.

GetLSN.doc: Function GetLSN returns the line style of the referenced object.

GetLVis.doc: Function GetLVis returns the visibility of the referenced layer.

GetLW.doc: Function GetLW returns the line weight of the referenced object. The value returned represents the width in mils.

GetMainDisplayBounds.doc: Returns the bounds of the main display device (Macintosh Only).

GetMarker.doc: Returns marker information on the referenced object.

GetMarkerPopupSelectedItem.doc: This is a deprecated function.  Use GetMarkerChoice instead.

GetMarkerValue.doc: Gets MarkerPopup value in dialog (replaces MarkerPopup procedures prior to VW2008).

GetMaterialArea.doc: Returns the surface area of the object having the specified material.

GetMaterialVolume.doc: Returns the volume of the object having the specified material.

GetMeshVertex.doc: Return the specified vertex of a mesh object.

GetMeshVertsCnt.doc: Returns the number of vertices of the passed mesh handle.

GetMirrorEmpty2DComp.doc: Gets whether the opposite view graphics are mirrored for empty 2D components of a symbol definition or plug-in object.

GetMouse.doc: Procedure GetMouse tracks and returns the current location of the cursor within the active Vectorworks document, allowing the cursor coordinates to be returned dynamically while moving the cursor onsc

GetMtlFillBackColor.doc: Returns the fill background color of the specified material. The color is returned as the RGB components of the color. RGB values are in the range of 0 65535.

GetMtlFillForeColor.doc: Returns the fill foreground color of the specified material. The color is returned as the RGB components of the color. RGB values are in the range of 0 65535.

GetMultilineText.doc: Gets the text that is contained in the given componentID.

GetName.doc: Function GetName returns the object name of the referenced object. The function returns None if the object has no object name.

GetNameFromResourceList.doc: Returns the name to display of the indicated item in the specified resource list.  If the list has items with the same name from different files, the display name will have the filename added to it in

GetNetAdapterInfo.doc: Return information about the network adapter

GetNextElement.doc: Returns the next element (sibling) of the given element.

GetNumAssociations.doc: Get number of associations for specified object.

GetNumberOfComponents.doc: Gets the number of components in an object.

GetNumberOfDLComponents.doc: Gets the number of components in the Double Line Preferences.

GetNumDashDataPairs.doc: Deprecated - will generate error. Use GetNumDashDataPairsN instead.

GetNumDashDataPairsN.doc: Function GetNumDashDataPairsN returns the number of dash/gap value pairs defined for the specified dash style. The "scale with thickness" setting is also returned. Dash styles support up to 5 dash/gap

GetNumGradientSegments.doc: Gets the number of segments in the gradient.

GetNumGradientSliderSegments.doc: Gets the number of segments in the gradient slider.

GetNumHoles.doc: Returns the number of openings in the referenced polyline.

GetNumImagePopupItems.doc: Returns the number of items in the image popup.

GetNumLayerLevelTypes.doc: Returns the number of layer level types in the file. A layer can be assigned a layer level type, which defines its location within a story.

GetNumLBColumns.doc: Gets the number of columns in the specified list browser control.

GetNumLBItems.doc: Gets the number of items in the specified list browser control.

GetNumLevelTemplates.doc: Returns the number of story level templates in the file. Story Levels contain a level type, elevation, and optional layer to be used to bound objects on stories; Story Level Templates define a generic

GetNumLineTypeItems.doc: Returns the number of line types in the line style control.

GetNumOfWallBreaks.doc: Gets the number of breaks in a wall.

GetNumResourceTags.doc: Returns the number of tags attached to the specified resource.

GetNumRoofElements.doc: Function GetNumRoofElements returns the number of roof elements (dormers and skylights) in the referenced roof object.

GetNumSelectedLBItems.doc: Returns the number of selected list browser items.

GetNumStories.doc: Returns the number of stories in the file. Stories are used to group layers and are shown on the Story pane of the Organization dialog.

GetNumStoryLayerTemplates.doc: Returns the number of story layer templates in the file. Story Layer Templates are used to define what Layers are typically found in a Story. When a Story is created, the user has the option to automa

GetNumTexLayers.doc: Returns number of texture layers (base + decals) for the specified part.

GetNumWallPeaks.doc: Returns the number of peaks in the referenced wall.

GetNurbsObjectDistanceFromPoint.doc: Returns the distance from the input point  to the input NURBS Object h.

GetObjArrow.doc: Procedure GetObjArrow returns the arrow style parameters for the indicated object.

GetObjBeginningMarker.doc: Gets all properties for an object's beginning marker. Return TRUE if operation was successful.

GetObjBoundElevation.doc: Get the elevation of the specified bound ID relative to the object's layer.

GetObject.doc: Function GetObject returns a handle to a named object. If the name does not exist, NIL is returned.

GetObjectByUuid.doc: Function GetObjectByUuid returns a handle to the object with the specified UUID. If the UUID is not valid, or if no object with that UUID exists, NIL is returned.

GetObjectHiddenLine.doc: Create lines representing the hidden line geometry of the specified object.

GetObjectTags.doc: Lets the user query the list of Tags set on an object such as a Class,Layer or Resource.

GetObjectUuid.doc: Function GetObjectUuid returns the UUID of the referenced object.

GetObjectVariableBoolean.doc: Returns the ON-OFF status of a Vectorworks object property.

GetObjectVariableHandle.doc: Returns the value of a Vectorworks object property.

GetObjectVariableInt.doc: Returns the value of a Vectorworks object property. Used with properties returning an INTEGER value.

GetObjectVariableLongInt.doc: Returns the value of a Vectorworks object property. Used with properties returning a LONGINT value.

GetObjectVariablePoint.doc: Returns the value of a Vectorworks object property. Used with properties returning a 2D or 3D point value.

GetObjectVariableReal.doc: Returns the value of a Vectorworks object property. Used with properties returning a REAL value. Always returns values in mm, regardless of document units.

GetObjectVariableString.doc: Returns the value of a Vectorworks object property. Used with properties returning a STRING value.

GetObjectWallHeight.doc: Gets an object's height value in it's break record.

GetObjectWallOffset.doc: Gets an object's offset value in it's break record.

GetObjectWallPerpOff.doc: Gets the perpendicular offset of an object in a wall.

GetObjEndMarker.doc: Gets all properties for an object's end marker. Return TRUE if operation was successful.

GetObjExpandTexture.doc: Function GetObjExpandTexture returns whether the referenced objects' textures have been "expanded". When a texture is expanded, different components of an object can have different textures.

GetObjExtentsInWall.doc: Gets the extents of a Plugin object or symbol that is in a wall.  Returns the object's start point and end point along the wall line.

GetObjStoryBound.doc: Get the data of the specified story bound of this object.

GetObjStoryBoundsAt.doc: Return the story bound ID of the specified story bound index. The index is between 1 and the result of GetObjStoryBoundsCnt.

GetObjStoryBoundsCnt.doc: Return the number of story bounds defined for this object.

GetObjTypeProperties.doc: Receives an object type and returns the properties of that object type

GetObjWallBreakMode.doc: Returns the break mode for an object in a wall.

GetObjWallInsertMode.doc: Returns the insertion mode for an object in a wall.

GetObjWallInsLocOff.doc: Gets the insert location offset of an object in a wall.

GetOpacity.doc: Gets the opacity of and object. Opacity is obtained as percentage value in range [0-100].

GetOpacityByClass.doc: Returns whether the object is using the class opacity.

GetOrigin.doc: Procedure GetOrigin returns the current origin location relative to the center of the page.

GetOriginInDocUnits.doc: Procedure GetOriginInDocUnits returns the current origin location relative to the center of the page in current units. It fixes the problem existing for GetOrigin (see remarks). The behavior is the sa

GetOSVersion.doc: Returns the version of the current operating system.

GetPaletteVisibility.doc: Gets the visibility state of a palette.

GetParameterOnNurbsCurve.doc: Given a NURBS curve handle and a point (in world space), this function returns the parameter of the point obtained by projecting the input point. The function also returns the index of the piece in th

GetParametricRecord.doc: Returns the handle to the parametric record attached the referenced object.

GetParamStyleType.doc: Returns the style type (by instance or by style) for a parameter.

GetParent.doc: Returns a handle to the parent container object of the referenced object. If the object does not have a container, a handle to the objects' layer will be returned.

GetPartDataID.doc: Return the numeric value assigned to this part instance represented by the specified sub-object.

GetPartInstanceName.doc: Return the unique name assigned to this part instance represented by the specified sub-object.

GetPartTypeInfo.doc: Get all part information for the specified sub-object. The sub-object must be an object that was tagged as a part.

GetPartTypeName.doc: Return the part type for the specified sub-object.

GetPatternData.doc: Get current choice for pattern popup dialog control, and the displayed foreground and background color indexes.

GetPenBack.doc: Procedure GetPenBack returns the pen background color of the referenced object. RGB values are in the range of 0 65535.

GetPenFore.doc: Procedure GetPenFore returns the pen foreground color components of the referenced object. RGB values are in the range of 0 65535.

GetPickObjectInfo.doc: Function GetPickObjectInfo returns a handle to an object found at a user selected point.

GetPlanarRef.doc: Get the plane ref ID of the specified object.

GetPlantToolInitialized.doc: Returns whether or not the plant tool has been initialized or not.

GetPlantToolPlacementMode.doc: This returns the current placement mode stored in the plant tool

GetPlantToolPlantName.doc: Returns the name of the current plant that is stored in the plant tool.

GetPlantToolSpacing.doc: This returns the spacing that is currently stored in the plant tool.

GetPluginChoiceIndex.doc: Returns true with outIndex as specified by inPluginNameand inParameterName.  Each of the input names are universal names.

GetPluginInfo.doc: Returns the name and attached parameter record of the currently executing plug-in. Use with menu command or tool item plug-ins.

GetPluginString.doc: Returns the string specified by stringIndex. The strings are created using the "Strings" button in the plug-in editor.

GetPluginStyle.doc: Get the name of the plug-in style for an object.

GetPluginStyleSymbol.doc: Retrieves the handled to a symbol that defines the plug-in style for a given plug-in object.

GetPointAndParameterOnNurbsCurveAtGivenL.doc: Gets point, parametric parameter, and curve index of specified location along a NURBS Curve.

GetPolylineArcMaxRadius.doc: Return a maximum radius of the specified vertex of type arc or radius of a polyline.

GetPolylineVertex.doc: Returns information about the specified polyline vertex.

GetPolyPt.doc: Procedure GetPolyPt returns the coordinates of a specified vertex of the referenced object.

GetPolyPt3D.doc: Procedure GetPolyPt3D returns the coordinates of the specified vertex of the referenced mesh, 3D polygon, or NURBS curve object.

GetPopUpChoiceIndex.doc: Gets the zero based index of the first choice in the pop-up which has itemText name. If there is no choice named itemText in the pop-up itemIndex is set to -1.

GetPref.doc: Function GetPref returns the on-off status of the specified preference item.

GetPrefInt.doc: Function GetPrefInt returns the value of a numeric Vectorworks preference setting.

GetPrefLongInt.doc: Returns the value of a Vectorworks preference setting. Used with preference settings returning a LONGINT value.

GetPrefReal.doc: Returns the value of a Vectorworks preference setting. Used with preference settings returning a REAL value.

GetPrefRGB.doc: Procedure GetPrefRGB return the RGB color components of the specified preference item. The RGB values are in the range of 0 - 65535.

GetPrefString.doc: Returns the value of a Vectorworks preference setting. Used with preference settings returning a STRING value.

GetPreviousElement.doc: Returns the previous element (sibling) of the given element.

GetPrimaryUnitInfo.doc: Procedure GetPrimaryUnitInfo returns the primary units settings for the active document.

GetProduct.doc: Identifies what NNA products and product packages are available in the current product installation.

GetProjectFullPath.doc: Gets the path and filename of the Project File for Project Sharing.

GetProjection.doc: Returns the projection index from the specified layer.

GetProjectionLocName.doc: Get the projection format localized name

GetProjectionProj4.doc: Get the projection information in Proj4 format.

GetProjectionWKT.doc: Get the projection information in Well Known Text (WKT) format..

GetProjectName.doc: Gets the name of the Project File for Project Sharing.

GetProjectUser.doc: For a given userid in the current Project, get their full name and permission level.

GetProjectUserNames.doc: Get a list of userids that are part of the current project.

GetPseudoIndFromDash.doc: Supplies a pseudo index for a dashed style. The returned index is not guaranteed to produce the same line type from file to file, nor even in the same file if line types change.

GetPt.doc: Procedure GetPt switches the cursor to selection mode and allows the user to select a point in a Vectorworks document. This cannot be used if there is a function anywhere in the calling chain.

GetPt3D.doc: Procedure GetPt3D switches the cursor to 3D selection mode and allows the user to select a point in a VectorWorks document. This cannot be used if there is a function anywhere in the calling chain.

GetPtInPoly.doc: Finds a point inside a polyline.

GetPtL.doc: Procedure GetPtL creates a temporary "rubberband" line from a specified point to the user selected end point. This cannot be used if there is a function anywhere in the calling chain.

GetPtL3D.doc: Procedure GetPtL3D creates a temporary "rubberband" 3D line from a specified point to the user selected end point. This cannot be used if there is a function anywhere in the calling chain.

GetRecord.doc: Returns the handle to a specified record attached the referenced object.

GetRect.doc: Procedure GetRect draws a temporary "rubberband" rectangle onscreen, similar to a selection marquee. The user defines the rectangle by selecting two points which define the top left and bottom right o

GetRect3D.doc: Procedure GetRect3D draws a temporary "rubberband" 3D rectangle on the working plane. The user defines the rectangle by selecting two points which define the top left and bottom right of the rectangle

GetResourceFromList.doc: Returns the indicated resource from the indicated resource list, if the resource is in the current document.  Otherwise it returns nil.

GetResourceString.doc: Returns the specified resource string from a resource file.

GetResourceTags.doc: Gets the tags attached to the specified resource.

GetRField.doc: Returns string description of a value in the specified record field.

GetRFieldOpt.doc: Get the options for a record field.

GetRoofAttributes.doc: Function GetRoofAttributes returns the attributes of the referenced roof object.

GetRoofEdge.doc: Procedure GetRoofEdge returns the definition attributes of a roof edge for the referenced roof object.

GetRoofElementType.doc: Returns information on the specified roof element.  The dormer type value is one of the following: 1 for Trapezium Dormer, 2 for Saddle Dormer, 3 for Shed Dormer, 4 for Slope Dormer, 5 for Bat Dormer.

GetRoofFaceAttrib.doc: Returns information on the referenced roof face object.

GetRoofFaceCoords.doc: Returns the coordinates of the defining geometry of a roof face.

GetRoofPreferences.doc: Gets the Roof Preferences. This can be used with the component calls and the Style selectors.

GetRoofPrefStyle.doc: Gets the Roof Style of the Roof Preferences.

GetRoofStyle.doc: Gets the Roof Style of a roof.

GetRoofVertices.doc: Function GetRoofVertices returns the number of roof edges in the referenced roof object.

GetRoundingBase.doc: Gets the rounding base (1, 2.5, or 5) for the display, primary units, and secondary units.

GetRRDiam.doc: Procedure GetRRDiam returns the horizontal and vertical diameters of the rounded corners of a rounded rectangle object.

GetSavedSetting.doc: Reads a value from the saved settnigs file.  This can be used to remember various user settings between running sessions of Vectorworks.  For example, a script may want to remember a dialog's position

GetScreen.doc: Procedure GetScreen returns the top-left and bottom-right corners of the display screen. These values will change as different sized screens are used. This procedure can be utilized to aid in developm

GetScriptResource.doc: Return the script text of the specified script resource.

GetSDName.doc: Function GetSDName returns the name of the referenced symbol definition.

GetSecondaryUnitInfo.doc: Procedure GetSecondaryUnitInfo sets the secondary unit parameters for the active document.

GetSegPt1.doc: Procedure GetSegPt1 returns the X-Y coordinates of the start point of the referenced line, wall, or linear dimension object.

GetSegPt2.doc: Procedure GetSegPt2 returns the end point of the of the referenced line, wall, or linear dimension object.

GetSelectedChoiceIndex.doc: Gets the index of the selected choice.

GetSelectedChoiceInfo.doc: Gets the index of the selected item and the text of the selected item in a menu.

GetSelectionRange.doc: Returns the range of the current selection for the specified control.

GetShaderRecord.doc: Returns the shader record of the specified family (1 = color, 2 = reflectivity, 3 = transparency, 4 = bump), if one is attached to the texture.

GetShedAttributes.doc: Procedure GetShedAttributes returns the attributes of a shed dormer in the referenced roof.

GetSheetLayerUserOrigin.doc: Gets the user origin of the specified sheet layer.

GetSingularConstraint.doc: Returns the type of constraint applied to the referenced object.

GetSkylight.doc: Function GetSkylight returns the definition attributes of a specified skylight in the referenced roof object.

GetSlabHeight.doc: Gets the height of a slab.

GetSlabPreferences.doc: Gets the Slab Preferences. This can be used with the component calls and the Style selectors.

GetSlabPreferencesStyle.doc: Gets the Slab Style of the Slab Preferences.

GetSlabStyle.doc: Gets the Slab Style of a slab.

GetSprdSortSum.doc: Procedure GetSprdSortSum returns sorting and summation options for a database row in the referenced worksheet.

GetSprdSortSumColumns.doc: Returns the sorting and summation options for a database row.

GetSpreadAngle.doc: Procedure GetSpreadAngle returns the spread angle of the referenced spot light.

GetStoryAbove.doc: Returns the Story above the indicated Story. Returns NULL if there is none. If passed a NULL handle, returns the top-most Story in the current drawing.

GetStoryBelow.doc: Returns the Story below the indicated Story. Returns NULL if there is none. If passed a NULL handle, returns the bottom-most Story in the current drawing.

GetStoryBoundChoiceStrings.doc: Gets the choice strings for a story bound control.

GetStoryBoundDataFromChoiceString.doc: Gets the story bound data from a story bound choice string.

GetStoryChoiceStrsN.doc: Gets story bound strings to supply to the bound popup. Can request strings for top bound, bottom bound, or dual (both) bounds.

GetStoryElevation.doc: Returns the elevaton of the indicated Story.

GetStoryElevationN.doc: Returns the elevaton of the indicated Story. The elevation is in document units.

GetStoryLayerInfo.doc: Returns information on the given story layer template

GetStoryLayerTemplateName.doc: Returns the name of the nth Story Layer Template in the file. For example, if 3 is passed in, it will return the name of the 3rd Story Layer Template in the file.

GetStoryOfLayer.doc: Returns the Story that the indicated Layer is associated with. Returns NULL if the Layer is not associated with a Story.

GetStorySuffix.doc: Returns the suffix of the indicated Story.

GetSymbolOptionsN.doc: Returns default class, insert  options, and break options for the specified symbol.

GetSymbolType.doc: Determines the type of the specified symbol instance.  The return values are:

GetSymBrightMult.doc: Function GetSymBrightMult returns the brightness multiplier of the referenced symbol.

GetSymDefSubType.doc: Returns the sub type defined for a symbol definiiton. This is used when creating and using plug-in styles.

GetSymLoc.doc: Procedure GetSymLoc returns the insertion point of the referenced symbol or plug-in object.

GetSymLoc3D.doc: Determines the location of a specified symbol or plug-in object in 3D space.

GetSymName.doc: Function GetSymName returns the symbol name of a referenced symbol in a Vectorworks document.

GetSymRot.doc: Function GetSymRot returns the rotation angle (in degrees) of the referenced symbol or plug-in object.

GetTaperedComponent.doc: Gets the tapered component of the object.

GetTexBFeatureEnd.doc: Procedure GetTexBFeatureEnd returns the "feature endpoint" of the referenced texture bitmap.  The point is expressed in pixels from the top left corner of the bitmap.

GetTexBFeatureStart.doc: Procedure GetTexBFeatureStart returns the "feature startpoint" of the referenced texture bitmap.   The point is expressed in pixels from the top left corner of the bitmap.

GetTexBitFeatureSize.doc: Function GetTexBitFeatureSize returns the feature size of the referenced bitmap in real world inches.

GetTexBitmapOrigin.doc: Procedure GetTexBitmapOrigin returns the origin of the bitmap applied to the referenced texture bitmap. The origin is measured in pixels, with the top left corner as (0,0).

GetTexBitPaintNode.doc: Function GetTexBitPaintNode returns the paint node of the referenced texture bitmap.

GetTexBitRepHoriz.doc: Function GetTexBitRepHoriz returns whether the referenced texture bitmap is set to repeat horizontally.

GetTexBitRepVert.doc: Function GetTexBitRepVert returns whether the referenced texture bitmap is set to repeat vertically.

GetTexMapBool.doc: Get map info for specific part of object. partID is texture part, overall is 3. Selector: init:1, flip:2, repH:3, repV:4, long edge:5, worldZ:6, auto align:7

GetTexMapBoolN.doc: Get map info for specific part of object. partID is texture part, overall is 3. Selector: init:1, flip:2, repH:3, repV:4, long edge:5, worldZ:6, auto align:7

GetTexMapInt.doc: Get map info for specific part of object. partID is texture part, overall is 3. Selector should be1, to return the texture map type integer.

GetTexMapIntN.doc: Get map info for specific part of object. partID is texture part, overall is 3. Selector should be1, to return the texture map type integer.

GetTexMapReal.doc: Get map info for specific part of object. partID is texture part, overall is 3. Selector: offsetX:1, offsetY:2, scale2D:3, rotate2D:4, radius:5, matrix mat00 through mat32: 6-17

GetTexMapRealN.doc: Get map info for specific part of object. partID is texture part, overall is 3. Selector: offsetX:1, offsetY:2, scale2D:3, rotate2D:4, radius:5, matrix mat00 through mat32: 6-17

GetTexSpace2DOffset.doc: Procedure GetTexSpace2DOffset returns the 2D offset for the referenced texture space in real-world inches.

GetTexSpace2DRadius.doc: Function GetTexSpace2DRadius returns the radius of the referenced texture space for applicable mapping types.

GetTexSpace2DRot.doc: Function GetTexSpace2DRot returns the rotation of the referenced texture space (in degrees).

GetTexSpace2DScale.doc: Function GetTexSpace2DScale returns the 2D scale for the referenced texture space.

GetTexSpaceEndCap.doc: Function GetTexSpaceEndCap returns whether the end cap of the referenced extrude or sweep is textured.

GetTexSpaceKind.doc: Function GetTexSpaceKind returns the object type for texture mapping space.

GetTexSpaceOrientU.doc: Procedure GetTexSpaceOrientU returns the vector that describes the u-axis of the referenced texture (from world space to texture space).

GetTexSpaceOrientV.doc: Procedure GetTexSpaceOrientV returns the vector that describes the v-axis of the referenced texture (from world space to texture space).

GetTexSpaceOrientW.doc: Procedure GetTexSpaceOrientW returns the vector that describes the w-axis of the referenced texture (from world space to texture space).

GetTexSpaceOrigin.doc: Procedure GetTexSpaceOrigin returns the offset of the referenced texture space that takes coordinates from world space to texture space.

GetTexSpacePartID.doc: Function GetTexSpacePartID returns the parent of the referenced texture space in an expanded object (walls or roofs).

GetTexSpaceStartCap.doc: Function GetTexSpaceStartCap returns whether the start cap of an extrude or sweep is textured.

GetText.doc: Function GetText returns the text contained within the referenced text object.

GetTextFont.doc: Procedure GetTextFont returns the font of the referenced text object at a specified position in the string.

GetTextJust.doc: Function GetTextJust returns the text justification of the referenced text object.

GetTextLeading.doc: Procedure GetTextLeading returns the custom leading value(in points) of the referenced text object.

GetTextLength.doc: GetTextLength returns the string length of the referenced text object.

GetTextOrientation.doc: Procedure GetTextOrientation returns the position and orientation attributes of the referenced text object.

GetTextSize.doc: Procedure GetTextSize returns the text point size at a specified position within the referenced text object. 1 point = 1/72".

GetTextSpace.doc: Procedure GetTextSpace returns the line spacing of the referenced text object.

GetTextStyle.doc: Procedure GetTextStyle returns the text style at a specified position within the referenced text object.

GetTextStyleRef.doc: Function GetTextStyleRef returns the text style for the referenced object. The integer returned is the internal index of the text style used by this object.

GetTextStyleRefN.doc: GetTextStyleRefN returns the text style reference at a specified position within the text object. Reference 0 means Un-Styled.

GetTextureBitmap.doc: Function GetTextureBitmap returns the bitmap object attached to the referenced texture.

GetTextureRef.doc: Function GetTextureRef returns the texture reference ID for the referenced object. The integer returned is the internal index of the texture node used by this object.

GetTextureRefN.doc: Returns the texture reference for a specified object.

GetTextureSet.doc: Gets the texture set of an object.

GetTextureShader.doc: Function GetTextureShader returns the LightWorks internal property reference ID for the shader attached to the referenced texture.

GetTextureShininess.doc: Function GetTextureShininess returns the shininess value of the referenced texture. The value is expressed as a percentage value with 0 equaling "Dull".

GetTextureSize.doc: Returns the texture size in real-world inches.

GetTextureSpace.doc: Function GetTextureSpace returns a handle to the texture space attached to the referenced object(or object part).

GetTextureTransp.doc: Function GetTextureTransp returns the degree of transparency applied to the referenced texture. It is expressed as a percentage with 0 creating an opaque texture.

IsAWorkingFile.doc: Returns True if the current document is a Project Sharing Working File. Otherwise returns False.

Wait.doc: Procedure Wait delays execution in VectorScript for a specified number of seconds.

Wall.doc: Procedure Wall creates a wall object in a Vectorworks document. The wall will adopt the current default settings for walls when created.

WallArea_Gross.doc: Returns the average of the gross area of the interior and exterior face of the wall. The gross area ignores holes in the wall.

WallArea_Net.doc: Returns the average of the net area of the interior and exterior face of the wall. The net area is adjusted for holes in the wall.

WallAverageHeight.doc: Returns the average height of walls, including wall peaks and different starting and ending heights.

WallCap.doc: Procedure WallCap creates a wall cap on a newly created wall object.

WallFootPrint.doc: Returns the handle of a polyline representing the footprint of a wall.

WallHeight.doc: Procedure WallHeight returns the wall heights of the referenced wall object.

WallPeak.doc: Creates a wall peak of the specified height at a specified distance from the wall start point.

WallThickness.doc: Returns the thickness of walls that meet the criteria.

WallTo.doc: Procedure WallTo creates a wall object in a Vectorworks document. WallTo begins the wall at the current graphics pen position, with the end point at the specified location.

WallWidth.doc: Function WallWidth returns the wall width of the referenced wall object.

WebDlgEnableConsole.doc: Enable web dialog console logging file. File located at: <user folder>/Plug-ins/ChromiumEF/WebBrowser_Console_Output.txt

Width.doc: Returns the width of an object matching the search criteria. If more than one object matches the search criteria, the function will return the sum of the matching object widths.

WorksheetMergeCells.doc: Merges the specified cells into a single cell.

WorksheetSplitCells.doc: Splits the specified cells back into individual cells.

Write.doc: Procedure Write outputs the specified data to an ASCII text file. The variable length parameter list specifies the data to be written to the file.

WriteBin.doc: Procedure WriteBin outputs the specified data to a binary file. The variable length parameter list specifies the data to be written to the file.

WriteLn.doc: Procedure WriteLn outputs the specified data to an ASCII text file. The variable length parameter list specifies the data to be written to the file.

WriteLnMac.doc: Writes a line of data to a text file using Macintosh character encoding for extended ASCII characters (128-255). This allows extended character data to be properly read and displayed by Vectorworks on

WriteMac.doc: Outputs the specified data to an ASCII text file. The variable length parameter list specifies the data to be written to the file.

WriteXMLMemory.doc: Creates XML data from an internal DOM tree.

ws2AddMenuGroup.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Adds a new menu group (container) by universal name before the specified index (-1 for the end) inside the provided menu path. See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2AddMenuItem.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Adds a new menu item by universal name before the specified index (-1 for the end) inside the provided menu path. See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2CommitChanges.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Offers restart or reload of the workspace to commit the changes made by this APIs.

ws2CreateTool.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Create a new tool.

ws2CreateToolPalette.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Create a new tool palette if it doesn't exist.

ws2CreateToolSet.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Create a new tool set if it doesn't exist. Retina icon will be loaded automatically if it has the same name suffixed with @2x.png and resolution 26 by 20 pixels.

ws2DelMenu.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Delete the menu at the specified menu path. See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2DelMenuAt.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Delete the menu at the specified index and menu path. See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2DelTool.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Delete the tool, tool set, or tool palette at the specified menu path. See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2FindMenuIndex.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Return the indx of the specified universal name inside the provided menu path. Return -1 if not found. See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2FindToolIndex.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Return the named tool index at the specified path. See 'ws2GetToolsCnt'.

ws2GetMenuAt.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Return the universal name of the specified index inside the provided menu path See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2GetMenuInfo.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Return the localized (if any) name, and shortkey combinations (if any) of the specified index inside the provided menu path. See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2GetMenusCnt.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Return the number of menu items at the speicfied path. Use '/' for path delimiter of universal menu names.

ws2GetToolAt.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Return the tool univ name at the specified index of the parent tool or tool set at the specified path. See 'ws2GetToolsCnt'.

ws2GetToolInfo.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Return the tool information at the specified index of the parent tool at the specified path. See 'ws2GetToolsCnt'.

ws2GetToolsCnt.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Return the number of tools at the specified path composed of universal names <tool palette>/<tool set>. See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2SetMenuInfo.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Set the localized (if any) name, and shortkey combinations (if any) of the specified index inside the provided menu path. See 'ws2GetMenusCnt'.

ws2SetToolInfo.doc: Workspace advanced APIs. Set the tool information at the specified index of the parent tool at the specified path. See 'ws2GetToolsCnt'.

wsDelete.doc: Delete all menu commands and tools under the specified 'companyName' added with 'wsEditBegin'.

wsEditAddMenu.doc: Add a menu under Tools -> Third-party. Use dot as a delimiter for sub menus in 'commandName'.

wsEditAddTool.doc: Add a menu under Third-party palette and companyName tool set.

wsEditAddTool2.doc: Add a menu under Third-party palette and companyName tool set. The menu is added underneath another existing tool in the tool set.

wsEditBegin.doc: Begin workspace edit. Use the other wsEdit* calls and must end with a call to wsEditEnd.

wsEditBeginN.doc: Begin workspace edit. Use the other wsEdit* calls and must end with a call to wsEditEnd.

wsEditEnd.doc: Finishes workspace edit started with wsEditBegin.

wsInstallCanceled.doc: This function must be called inside 'add_to_workspace' script and it will mark the install as canceled, interrupting the install.

wsInstallFailed.doc: This function must be called inside 'add_to_workspace' script and it will mark the install as failed, showing an alert dialog at the end.

WSScript_AddHandle.doc: Add a handle for a worksheet script usage. This is most notable used for scripts that generate object database for worksheets.
